title: From Copilot to Colleague: Trustworthy Agents for High-Stakes
subtitle: Event ledger — Joel Hron, Thomson Reuters

claims.text: The north star has shifted from helpfulness to productive output
Systems are now expected to produce output and make judgments and decisions

anchors.label: Joel Hron, Thomson Reuters
anchors.quote: we're asking AI systems to now produce output and produce judgments and decisions

claims.text: Human oversight works best when agency dials are tuned, not maximized

anchors.label: Joel Hron, Thomson Reuters
anchors.quote: dial these agency dials far up.

claims.text: Agency is not binary but a lever you can dial up or down

anchors.label: Joel Hron, Thomson Reuters
anchors.quote: a binary thing but as a lever that you can dial

claims.text: Autonomous systems must have bounded authority before they can earn trust
claims.caveats: Book synthesis claim — anchored to this talk as primary evidence.

anchors.label: Joel Hron, Thomson Reuters
anchors.quote: we're asking AI systems to now produce output and produce judgments and decisions
